prose: The HOMO–LUMO gap of the water molecule was computed at the DFT level of theory using the B3LYP functional paired with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The geometry provided a fixed structure of H₂O (three atoms: O and two H's). The computation was performed by PySCF, yielding a HOMO–LUMO gap of 8.9406687 eV. SCF convergence was confirmed within 7 cycles, and no warnings were reported. Command: `cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard`.
